commandDescription.zh-CN: 配置 workflow 执行后端与异步模式
commandDescription.en-US: Configure workflow execution backend and async mode

cancelToolDescription.zh-CN: 取消正在后台运行的 workflow

noneRunning.zh-CN: 当前没有正在运行的 workflow

resultWritten.zh-CN:
Workflow {name} 已完成（{count} 个 agent，耗时 {ms}ms）。
结果已写入: {path}
resultWritten.en-US:
Workflow {name} completed with {count} agent(s) in {ms}ms.
Result written to: {path}

started.zh-CN: Workflow {name} 已启动，后台执行中...

subagentRequired.zh-CN:
PI_WORKFLOW_BACKEND=subagent 需要 pi-interactive-subagents 扩展。
安装: pi install pi-interactive-subagents
subagentRequired.en-US:
PI_WORKFLOW_BACKEND=subagent requires the pi-interactive-subagents extension.
Install: pi install pi-interactive-subagents
